components.name: LabShell
components.description: Component-reference page chrome. Named primitive family for a docs-site layout: sticky sidebar + scrollable main + header + section + example blocks. Forty-plus classes map 1:1 to the classic component-lab pattern.

classes.description: Grid root with sidebar (256px) and main (1fr).
Sticky left column with brand + nav groups.
Fixed top block inside the sidebar (brand + lead).
Sidebar nav group with top hairline separator.
Nav link list container (flex column, 1px gap).
Taxonomy explainer block (recessed card with definition list).
Section block with bottom hairline + scroll-margin.
Section head (h2 + note, flex baseline space-between).
Example demo panel (white card, 24px 28px padding, subtle shadow).
Modifier: remove internal padding + hide overflow.
Modifier: use recessed surface background instead of white.
Example caption paragraph below the demo.
Mobile drawer scrim (covers main, dismisses drawer on tap). Hidden until parent has .is-nav-open at <=1040px.
Mobile FAB toggle for the sidebar drawer. Use on a strand-btn (icon-only + circular). Hidden by default; shown only at <=1040px breakpoint.
State class on the .strand-ref-shell mount; consumer toggles to open the mobile drawer.

components.name: LabGlassStage
components.description: Cinematic glass-surface specimen container. Renders a layered blue/teal gradient backdrop with an embedded frosted-glass panel.

classes.description: Gradient backdrop (radial + diagonal linear, overflow hidden).
Frosted panel with backdrop-filter, translucent dark bg, hairline border.

components.description: Staggered entry animation specimen. Four lines animate in at 0 / 180 / 360 / 540 ms. Remount the stage (new key/ref) to replay.

components.name: LabTip
components.description: Pure-CSS tooltip specimen (not the production Tooltip). Use on docs pages to show the four fixed bubble placements. Supports --pinned for screenshots.

classes.description: Inline-flex trigger wrapper (hover/focus reveals the bubble).
Pinned modifier: force the bubble to show without hover.
Placement modifier: bubble above the trigger.
Placement modifier: bubble below the trigger.
Placement modifier: bubble left of the trigger.
Placement modifier: bubble right of the trigger.

components.description: Utility-class demo tiles. A row of cells each pairing a class name + demo + caption on a recessed surface with a dashed demo inset.

classes.description: Horizontal row of util cells with wrap.
Dashed demo area that hosts the content being measured.
Blue-midnight pill block used inside the demo (shows the effect of the utility).

components.name: Swatch
components.description: Color swatch specimen for design-token documentation. The swatch grid auto-fills with 160px tiles; each tile sets its own background/color inline (tone-dependent).

classes.description: Single color tile with border + min-height; background/color set inline.

components.example: blue-primary #3B8EF6

components.name: TypeSpecimen
components.description: Typography specimen. Stacks a display line on top of a mono meta row; siblings are separated by dashed dividers.

classes.description: Specimen container (vertical stack with dashed top border).
Mono meta row; inline <b> children highlight in blue-primary.

components.example:

components.name: TokenSpecimen
components.description: Spacing/radius/shadow token specimen tiles. Each tile pairs a visual (spacer bar, rounded box, or shadow tile) with mono labels. Visual dimensions are set inline per token.

classes.description: Single token specimen (vertical stack + mono labels).
Horizontal spacer bar (blue-primary); width set inline.
64x64 box; radius and box-shadow set inline per specimen.

components.example: space-4 16px

components.name: ContainerScale
components.description: Container-width visualizer. Renders proportional horizontal bars (narrow / default / wide / full) against a 0-to-max axis.

classes.description: Track surface (22px tall, recessed, hairline border).
Proportional bar; width set inline per row.
